display.name: Wayfarer Grave Goods
display.short_description: A lone cairn slumps beside the path. Burial nails pin the marker down, and a weather-swollen satchel hangs untouched beneath it.

choices.label: Take the burial nails
choices.summary: Pull the iron nails free and hammer their last use back into your weapon.

choices.label: Open the satchel
choices.summary: Break the grave cord and claim the coin weight the dead no longer need.
